failures.description: The agent misread the ProductCatalogSearch result and selected the last/highest-priced returned item instead of the first/lowest-priced item.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to identify the cheapest available Electric Kettle using the ProductCatalogSearch evidence. The relevant tool output was available at index 3 and listed items sorted by ascending price, with item 1240311797 at $137.17 as the cheapest. At index 4, the Executor synthesized an answer claiming item 2243454707 at $164.46 was the cheapest, which contradicts the tool output. This is not an invalid tool call or unsupported intent; it is an incorrect interpretation/use of the returned catalog results.
